page_metadata.biotools__summary: BBPpred is a web application used to identify Blood-brain barrier peptides (BBPs) using a logistic regression classifier based on feature representation learning scheme. BBPs can cross the blood-brain barrier based on various mechanisms and have a variety of biomedical applications.
